arts.ttl: We simulated Manchester United vs Arsenal as Premier League classic predicted
arts.sum: We predict that Arsenal could line up in a 4-3-3 formation, with their starting XI as follows: Raya; Timber, Saliba, Gabriel, Calafiori; Partey, Rice, Odegaard; Nwaneri, Merino, Trossard. After failing to win their last two Premier League games, Arsenal enter their clash with Man United on the weekend in high spirits following their 7-1 demolition of PSV in the Champions League knockout stages.

arts.ttl: Andrea Berta's transfer history assessed as Arsenal 'reach agreement' for award-winning sporting director
arts.sum: Arsenal and Andrea Berta reportedly reach an agreement for the former Atletico Madrid chief to become the Gunners' new sporting director, replacing Edu.

arts.ttl: Manchester United sent 'dangerous' warning as pundits all in agreement with Arsenal prediction
arts.sum: United return to Premier League action on Sunday with Arsenal the visitors to Old Trafford

arts.ttl: 'My actions sparked chaotic Man Utd vs Arsenal brawl – 21 players got involved in carnage'
arts.sum: The rivalry between Arsenal and Manchester United has long been one of the most intense in English football - and there's one figure who knows that as well as anyone

arts.sum: Although Arsenal fans might have preferred their club to invest in a new striker last summer, the funds Mikel Arteta spent on Riccardo Calafiori have...

arts.ttl: Man Utd pre-season plans set to be confirmed with imminent Premier League announcement
arts.sum: Manchester United are one of four Premier League clubs heading to the United States in July to participate in the 2025 Summer Series

arts.ttl: Harry Redknapp wades into Bruno Fernandes row and destroys Man Utd captain
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes has come in for criticism at times this season and former Premier League manager Harry Redknapp has now given his thoughts on the Manchester United captain

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer shares "so easy" Manchester United vs Arsenal prediction
arts.sum: Premier League legend Alan Shearer has shared his prediction ahead of Arsenal's trip to Manchester United, with both teams having played midweek games in Europe

arts.ttl: Arsenal have dream five-game Bukayo Saka Champions League scenario as Mikel Arteta boost imminent
arts.sum: That can extend towards the end of April and then the start of May. I f all goes well, Arsenal will play in the last game of the European season on May 31: The Champions League final. All but through in the Champions League to the quarter-finals, Mikel Arteta's side only have meaningful fixtures until April 16, for now.

arts.ttl: Man Utd vs Arsenal predictions as Ruben Amorim's 'survival' hope put to the test
arts.sum: MANCHESTER UNITED vs ARSENAL: The old rivals meet at Old Trafford on Sunday afternoon, but the clash is a world away from the title battles they used to indulge in
